story: Trunk Tools' stack cut document review from 60 days to 10 by ditching general-purpose models
title: AI Boost: 80% Faster
script: Trunk Tools cuts review time from sixty days to ten. This matters because it showcases the limitations of general-purpose AI models and highlights the importance of specialized solutions. By ditching these models for a custom-built three-layer architecture based on highly detailed data, the company achieved stunning results, preventing costly field errors and increasing efficiency. The impact on industries like construction could be significant, so what's next for companies relying on slow and laborious document review processes now?
